data.body:
Part of #231

CP-A2b **mirror phase VALIDATED**. Adds the Results section to `cp-a2b-runbook.md`: the final-run verdict (MR-compliant 8/8, MR-non-compliant issue-link red + 7 green = rung 1 operational), the layered findings table (#12/#13/#14 with their fixing PRs #235/#236/#237), and evidence placeholders for the mirror job URLs. Notes the remaining CP-A2b **SCIT phase** as the only gap to A2's total closure.

Docs-only. Part of #231.
